message:
The other day, my pup, Max, decided it was a great time to bolt out the door when the mailman swung by. In my frantic chase, I reached for my phone to call for help — only to find the battery had died. Talk about a comedy of errors! Thankfully, I managed to coax him back with some treats, but it got me thinking about how unprepared I was in that moment. 

It’s a good reminder to have a plan B (and maybe a portable charger) in case tech lets us down when we need it most. Anyone else had a tech fail at the worst possible time? How did you handle it?
